coverage: Web Locks elects one poller and hands leadership over after close
fallback startup grace elects exactly one poller and TTL failover preserves requested sessions
late join replays local requests so the leader reconstructs their union
stop publishes unsubscribe for every local request
stale leadership messages cannot demote a current leader
without a channel Web Locks cannot start a background poller
without BroadcastChannel or Web Locks no tab polls
app network guard prevents event fetches when coordination has no polling capability

scenarios.name: late-join-request-replay
scenarios.expected: The elected leader polls the union of existing and joining tabs' requested sessions.
scenarios.evidence: late join replays local requests so the leader reconstructs their union

scenarios.name: tab-stop-cleanup
scenarios.expected: Stopping a tab removes every one of its requested sessions from peers.
scenarios.evidence: stop publishes unsubscribe for every local request

scenarios.name: leadership-freshness
scenarios.expected: Expired or older-epoch leader messages cannot demote the current leader.
scenarios.evidence: stale leadership messages cannot demote a current leader

scenarios.name: unsupported-capability-policy
scenarios.expected: Without BroadcastChannel, coordinated background catch-up is disabled even when Web Locks exists; the app exposes degraded manual-refresh status. With neither capability no tab polls.
scenarios.evidence: without a channel Web Locks cannot start a background poller; without BroadcastChannel or Web Locks no tab polls; app network guard prevents event fetches when coordination has no polling capability
